name: Nevermoor's Slashers | Slashfic
description:
After your friends mess around with a haunted book, after you'd told them to put it down, you found yourself cornered by a man in a wolf mask carrying a knife stained with the blood from one of your friends. The only question is what will you do to keep your friends and yourself alive?

~ ~ ~

Based heavily off of Dorian's Slashfic! This WILL have spoilers for the game, though of course it's only if you ask the right questions... If you survive. I don't see a lot of these bots. Note that this could get crazy, considering there are four different characters the AI has to keep track of.

~ ~ ~

Extra tags for search purposes: Mike Leather Ghost Jay Slasher Slashers Slashfic
creator: justanother_gremlin
